headline: 3 Aerospace Stocks Ready to Ride the Aftermarket Rebound
summary: FEATURE  Aerospace stocks have been weak amid geopolitical tensions and higher oil prices. Some have started to rebound. Others, curiously, have lagged.  That’s an opportunity for investors. Citi has three stocks to check out.

headline: GSK hepatitis B drug a long-term opportunity but US bank holds back from upgrading
summary: Citi is holding back from recommending GSK PLC (LSE:GSK, NYSE:GSK) shares despite a significant clinical breakthrough in hepatitis B treatment, arguing that unanswered commercial questions mean any value from the new drug is unlikely to materialise for shareholders in the near term. The bank...

headline: SpaceX Lowers IPO Valuation Target to at Least $1.8 Trillion

headline: Why The Story Around Ionis Pharmaceuticals (IONS) Is Shifting After Fresh Analyst Targets And Guidance
summary: The fair value estimate for Ionis Pharmaceuticals has shifted from US$96.73 to US$100.92, a modest reset that puts fresh numbers around the stock. This move comes during an active period of Street research, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them, reflecting different views on how to factor pipeline milestones and revenue guidance into valuation work. As you read on, you will see what is driving these updates and how to keep track of the evolving analyst narrative around...
